title: Conflicts + Manual Observations + Notifications
description: Implements semantic conflict detection (BullMQ semantic-conflict-job + Grok equivalence classifier + KeyEquivalenceCache), conflict inbox resolution APIs/UI, manual observation creation with attestation, and live notification delivery over the existing pipeline SSE channel. Stack context: PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector + pg_trgm, Drizzle ORM, BullMQ + Redis, Cloudflare R2, Next.js 14 App Router, Auth.js credentials+JWT, PaddleOCR-VL 1.5, Grok grok-4-1-fast-reasoning, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, mem0, strict TypeScript. Deployment context: three processes (Next.js app :3000, pipeline worker health :3002, PDF worker health :3003).

env_vars_required.description: PostgreSQL connection used by Next.js API handlers and pipeline worker for conflict/notification writes and reads.
BullMQ backend and Redis pub/sub transport for pipeline SSE + notification events.
Grok API key used by semantic equivalence classifier for uncached key pairs.
Auth.js server URL required for authenticated API and SSE session handling.
Auth.js JWT/cookie signing secret; JWT payload shape is { user_id, company_id, role }.
Required for production reverse-proxy deployments with Auth.js.

files.purpose: Canonical pair hashing utility for KeyEquivalenceCache lookups and inserts.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Export buildCacheKey(keyA: string, keyB: string): string that sorts the two keys alphabetically, joins with ':', computes SHA-256, and returns a lowercase hex digest. Enforce deterministic output so buildCacheKey('b','a') equals buildCacheKey('a','b').

files.purpose: Winner selection for conflict pairs using provenance-aware timestamps.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Export latestWins(obsA, obsB) that resolves source timestamps as: provenance_type=document -> document_version.uploaded_at; provenance_type=manual -> attestation_record.created_at. Return { winner, loser }. If timestamps are equal, return obsA as winner and log anomaly. If document embedded doc_date differs from uploaded_at by >30 days, log anomaly_notice without changing winner.

files.purpose: Grok-based normalized key equivalence classification for semantic conflict detection.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Export callGrokEquivalence(input) with 30s timeout. Prompt: Are these two ESG observation keys referring to the same real-world metric? Include key/label/unit for A and B. Require response first token SAME_KEY or DIFFERENT_KEY, then rationale. Parse token and rationale. On malformed response, log parse error and return DIFFERENT_KEY conservatively. Model identifier: grok-4-1-fast-reasoning.

files.purpose: Candidate pair query builder based on pg_trgm similarity + unit/time overlap.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Export findCandidatePairs(db, observationId, companyId) that loads obs_a and queries approved obs_b where company_id matches, id != observationId, similarity(obs_b.normalized_key, obs_a.normalized_key) >= 0.5 OR obs_b.unit = obs_a.unit, and period ranges overlap (obs_b.period_start <= obs_a.period_end AND obs_b.period_end >= obs_a.period_start).

files.purpose: BullMQ consumer for semantic-conflict-job with cache, classifier, latest-wins, conflict inserts, stale marking, and event publication.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Implement processSemanticConflictJob(job) for queue semantic-conflict-job. Step 1: load obs_a and skip if status != approved. Step 2: generate candidates via pg_trgm query. Step 3 per candidate: exact-key short-circuit, else cache lookup by canonical key pair, else call Grok and insert key_equivalence_cache with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Step 4 for SAME_KEY/exact: normalize/compare numeric values and skip when equal within 0.1%; determine winner via latestWins; insert conflict_case with auto_resolved=true, resolution_status=auto_resolved, match_method exact|semantic, observation_ids [a,b], winning_observation_id, and idempotent pair uniqueness guard; if insert skipped, continue. Step 5: set loser status superseded; mark derivation_results stale where loser in input_observation_ids. Step 6: insert notification row type conflict_detected payload { conflictId, normalizedKey }; publishNotification(companyId, notification). Step 7: publishPipelineEvent(companyId, { type: conflict_detected, conflictId, normalizedKey, matchMethod, timestamp }). Retry attempts: 3 with exponential backoff 2s/4s/8s. Grok timeout/failure must not fail job; log and continue.

files.purpose: Notification persistence + Redis pub/sub fan-out to existing pipeline SSE channel.

sections.label: module-content
sections.content: Export publishNotification(companyId, input) that inserts into notification table, computes unreadCount using SELECT COUNT(*) scoped to company/user semantics, and publishes JSON event to redis channel pipeline:events:{companyId} with type=notification, notificationId, notificationType, payload, unreadCount, timestamp. Guarantee DB insert occurs before publish.

files.purpose: Paginated conflict listing with filters and response contract for inbox UI.

sections.label: route-content
sections.content: Implement GET /api/conflicts with auth required. Parse query: resolutionStatus auto_resolved|user_reviewed|user_overridden (optional), matchMethod exact|semantic (optional), normalizedKey (optional), page default 1, limit default 20. Apply tenant scope by session.company_id via withTenant helper. Return 200 { data, total, page, pageSize } with winningObservation and losingObservations projections including sourceDocumentFilename and uploadedAt.

files.purpose: Manual override endpoint for latest-wins conflict resolution.

sections.label: route-content
sections.content: Implement POST /api/conflicts/{id}/resolve. Enforce role editor|admin (viewer => 403). Validate body { chosenObservationId: uuid, reason?: string <=500 }. Ensure chosenObservationId exists in conflict observation_ids; else 422. Enforce tenant ownership through withTenant. In single DB transaction: set chosen observation approved; set other approved observations superseded; insert conflict_resolution; update conflict_case resolution_status=user_overridden and winning_observation_id; update derivation_results stale=true where any affected observation in input_observation_ids; insert notification type conflict_resolved payload { conflict_id, chosen_observation_id, resolutionStatus: user_overridden }; insert audit_log. Publish notification after transaction commit. Return 200 { conflictId, resolutionStatus: user_overridden, winningObservationId }. Return 404 for not found/out-of-tenant conflict.

files.purpose: Manual observation creation endpoint with attestation and optional immediate approval path.

sections.label: route-content
sections.content: Implement POST /api/observations/manual. Enforce role editor|admin (viewer => 403). Validate payload: label required<=200, normalizedKey regex ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]{0,99}$, value required, numericValue required for dataType numeric|percentage, periodStart/periodEnd required for timeBehavior periodic with periodEnd>=periodStart, status only candidate|approved, note<=1000, sourceReference<=500, categoryId if present belongs to session.company_id. In transaction: insert observation provenance_type=manual with company_id and created_by from JWT; insert attestation_record action submitted|approved with note/source_reference and created_by; update observation.attestation_record_id; insert audit_log. After commit, if status approved enqueue semantic-conflict-job payload { observationId, companyId }. Return 201 { id, status, attestationRecordId }. Return 422 { code, field } on validation failure.

files.purpose: Notification listing endpoint with unread filtering and aggregate unread count.

sections.label: route-content
sections.content: Implement GET /api/notifications with auth required. Parse query unread=true|false optional, page default 1, limit default 30. Scope rows where company_id=session.company_id and (user_id=session.user_id OR user_id IS NULL). Return 200 { data, total, unreadCount, page, pageSize }.

files.purpose: Marks one notification as read with ownership checks.

sections.label: route-content
sections.content: Implement PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read with no body. Validate ownership and tenant scope: target notification must match company_id and user_id=session.user_id or be company-wide user_id NULL. Update read=true and return 200 { id, read: true }. Return 404 if not found or out of scope.

files.purpose: Conflicts route entrypoint.

sections.label: page-content
sections.content: Render ConflictInboxPage with server-side initial fetch to GET /api/conflicts and client interactivity for filters/pagination.

files.purpose: Paginated conflict inbox UI with filters, empty state, and override integration.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: Render filter bar (resolutionStatus: Tous/Non résolus/Résolus, matchMethod select), paginated ConflictCard list, and empty state 'Aucun conflit non résolu'. Fetch conflicts from GET /api/conflicts; apply optimistic updates after override success.

files.purpose: Winner/loser side-by-side conflict display and action trigger.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: Show normalizedKey badge, match method (Exact/Sémantique), period, winner (green) and loser (red) columns with value/unit/sourceDocumentFilename/uploadedAt. For auto_resolved or user_reviewed show action button on losing column opening ConfirmOverrideDialog; for user_overridden show read-only badge 'Résolu manuellement'.

files.purpose: Override confirmation dialog with optional reason.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: Use shadcn AlertDialog with text 'Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir remplacer la valeur gagnante actuelle ?'. Include optional reason textarea max 500. On confirm call POST /api/conflicts/{id}/resolve { chosenObservationId, reason }. Optimistically update card; rollback and show Sonner toast on error.

files.purpose: Dialog form for manual observations with full validation and API integration.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: Implement react-hook-form + Zod fields: label, normalizedKey, value, numericValue, unit, dataType, timeBehavior, periodStart, periodEnd, categoryId, status (default candidate), note, sourceReference. Enforce constraints from §4.12. On submit call POST /api/observations/manual; on success close dialog, append observation optimistically, toast 'Observation ajoutée'; on error show field errors.

files.purpose: Topbar notification bell with unread badge and live SSE updates.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: On mount fetch GET /api/notifications?unread=true for initial unreadCount/list. Subscribe to existing pipeline SSE stream; on notification event increment unreadCount and prepend dropdown item. Open Popover on click showing NotificationItem rows. Add 'Tout marquer comme lu' that PATCHes each unread notification and clears badge.

files.purpose: Renders notification row with icon/copy/time and click behavior.

sections.label: component-content
sections.content: Map notification types to icons and FR copy: pipeline_done, conflict_detected, conflict_resolved, report_ready. Show relative timestamp via date-fns (ex: il y a 2 minutes). On click navigate to target page (conflict types -> /conflicts) and mark as read via PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read.

files.purpose: Extends existing Slice 2 SSE endpoint to emit conflict and notification event types.

sections.label: patch-content
sections.content: Extend discriminated union of outgoing SSE payloads with conflict_detected and notification events. Keep existing Last-Event-ID replay buffer behavior from Slice 2. Ensure company_id is read exclusively from authenticated session (ignore query parameter).

files.purpose: Renders NotificationBell in topbar.

sections.label: patch-content
sections.content: Insert NotificationBell component in topbar action cluster without changing existing auth/logout controls.

files.purpose: Adds unresolved conflict badge tied to conflict_detected updates.

sections.label: patch-content
sections.content: Add unresolved conflicts count badge initialized from GET /api/conflicts?resolutionStatus=auto_resolved. Increment on conflict_detected SSE and hide when count is zero.

files.purpose: Adds manual observation trigger in observations page.

sections.label: patch-content
sections.content: Add '+ Ajouter manuellement' button that opens ManualObservationForm dialog.

validation_rules: Require authenticated session JWT with shape { user_id, company_id, role }.
Apply tenant scope by session.company_id only.
resolutionStatus must be one of auto_resolved|user_reviewed|user_overridden when provided.
matchMethod must be exact|semantic when provided.
page and limit must be positive integers.
implementation_notes: Use tenant transaction helper src/lib/db/rls.ts symbol withTenant to enforce session.company_id scope.
Use schema symbols from src/lib/db/schema/conflicts.ts: conflictCases, conflictResolutions.
Join observation sources from src/lib/db/schema/observations.ts symbol observations and src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts symbol documentVersions.
Filter/serialize enum values defined in drizzle/migrations/0001_foundation.sql and 0005_derivation_conflict.sql.
Satisfies Slice 4 §4.4 contract with pagination and normalizedKey filter covering semantic groups.

validation_rules: Reject viewer role with 403.
chosenObservationId must be valid UUID.
reason max length 500 chars.
chosenObservationId must exist in conflict_case.observation_ids array or return 422.
Conflict must be in authenticated tenant via session.company_id.
Already user_overridden conflict cannot be re-overridden without admin role.

error_responses.condition: Role is viewer or non-admin re-override attempt
Conflict ID not found within tenant scope
chosenObservationId not present in conflict observation_ids

implementation_notes: Run all mutating steps in one DB transaction using src/lib/db/rls.ts symbol withTenant.
Update statuses in src/lib/db/schema/observations.ts symbol observations using observation_status enum from drizzle/migrations/0001_foundation.sql.
Insert resolution in src/lib/db/schema/conflicts.ts symbol conflictResolutions and update conflictCases.resolution_status/user_overridden.
Mark stale derivations in src/lib/db/schema/derivations.ts symbol derivationResults where chosen/loser IDs appear in input_observation_ids.
Insert audit row through src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts symbol auditLog (defined in drizzle/migrations/0007_async_audit_rls.sql).
After commit call src/lib/notifications/publish.ts symbol publishNotification to emit notification event over Redis pub/sub from src/lib/redis.ts client.
Queue names/timeouts remain defined in src/lib/constants.ts and src/lib/queues.ts from Slice 1; this endpoint does not enqueue new jobs.

validation_rules: Reject viewer role with 403.
normalizedKey regex must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]{0,99}$.
status must be candidate or approved only.
numericValue required when dataType is numeric or percentage.
For periodic timeBehavior, periodStart and periodEnd are required and periodEnd >= periodStart.
categoryId if provided must belong to session.company_id.
note max 1000 and sourceReference max 500.

error_responses.condition: Body fails Zod validation or tenant category check

implementation_notes: Insert observation in src/lib/db/schema/observations.ts symbol observations with provenance_type=manual and created_by from JWT claims.
Insert attestation in src/lib/db/schema/observations.ts symbol attestationRecords using action submitted|approved, then set observations.attestation_record_id.
If status=approved enqueue semantic-conflict-job via src/lib/queues.ts symbol semanticConflictQueue with timeout 60000 ms (global queue catalog in src/lib/constants.ts).
Use UUIDv7 generator introduced in Slice 1 for new IDs.
Insert audit entry into src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts symbol auditLog.
Tenant enforcement must use src/lib/db/rls.ts symbol withTenant and JWT shape from src/lib/auth.ts callbacks / src/types/auth.ts augmentation.

validation_rules: Require authenticated session.
Filter rows to company_id=session.company_id.
Visibility rule: user_id=session.user_id OR user_id IS NULL.
page and limit must be positive integers.
unread if provided must be boolean-like string true|false.
implementation_notes: Read from src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts symbol notifications.
Use src/lib/db/rls.ts symbol withTenant to ensure tenant isolation.

Notification type enum must match migration contract in drizzle/migrations/0001_foundation.sql (enum notification_type) and notification table shape in drizzle/migrations/0006_report_chat_notification.sql.
Compute unreadCount with same ownership predicate used by list query.
Endpoint data backs src/components/notifications/NotificationBell.tsx initial state.

validation_rules: Require authenticated session.
No body required.
Notification must match tenant company_id and (user_id=session.user_id OR user_id IS NULL).

error_responses.condition: Notification not found in accessible scope

implementation_notes: Update src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts symbol notifications.read in tenant transaction via withTenant.
Used by NotificationItem and NotificationBell bulk mark-read interaction.
Preserves RLS ownership contract from Slice 1/3 infrastructure.

background_jobs.trigger: Enqueued when an observation transitions to approved (document review approval in Slice 3 or manual observation creation in Slice 4 with status=approved).

steps.label: Load and gate approved source observation
steps.detail: SELECT obs_a by observationId and companyId; if not found or obs_a.status != approved, exit job successfully without side effects.

steps.label: Find candidate near-duplicates
steps.detail: Run SQL: SELECT obs_b.* FROM observations obs_b WHERE obs_b.company_id = $companyId AND obs_b.id != $observationId AND obs_b.status = 'approved' AND (similarity(obs_b.normalized_key, $obs_a_normalized_key) >= 0.5 OR obs_b.unit = $obs_a_unit) AND obs_b.period_start <= $obs_a_period_end AND obs_b.period_end >= $obs_a_period_start. Requires pg_trgm index on normalized_key from prior slices.

steps.label: Per-candidate equivalence classification
steps.detail: If normalized keys are exact match, classify as SAME_KEY with match_method=exact and skip LLM. Else compute canonical cache key from sorted key pair. Query key_equivalence_cache by (company_id, key_a, key_b). On cache miss call Grok classifier with key/label/unit prompt and parse first token SAME_KEY or DIFFERENT_KEY. Insert cache row with ON CONFLICT(company_id,key_a,key_b) DO NOTHING.

steps.label: Confirm actual value conflict
steps.detail: For SAME_KEY or exact matches normalize comparable numeric values; if values are equal within tolerance 0.1%, skip pair (not a conflict).

steps.label: Apply latest-wins and upsert conflict case
steps.detail: Compute winner/loser using latestWins: document provenance timestamp=document_version.uploaded_at; manual provenance timestamp=attestation_record.created_at; tie=>obs_a winner. Insert conflict_case with normalized_key, conflict_group_id (existing from candidate group or new UUIDv7), match_method exact|semantic, observation_ids [obs_a.id,obs_b.id], winning_observation_id=winner.id, auto_resolved=true, resolution_status=auto_resolved. Use idempotent pair uniqueness guard to skip duplicate insert created by concurrent workers.

steps.label: Supersede loser and stale derivations
steps.detail: UPDATE observations SET status='superseded' WHERE id=$loser_id. UPDATE derivation_results SET stale=true WHERE $loser_id = ANY(input_observation_ids).

steps.label: Emit notifications and SSE events
steps.detail: Insert notification row type conflict_detected payload { conflictId, normalizedKey }. Call publishNotification(companyId, notification) which publishes type=notification event to Redis channel pipeline:events:{companyId} with unreadCount. Publish additional pipeline SSE event type=conflict_detected with conflictId/normalizedKey/matchMethod/timestamp.

steps.label: Completion semantics
steps.detail: No pipeline_run status update is performed because semantic-conflict-job is a side-effect job, not a core pipeline stage.

error_handling: BullMQ retries: 3 attempts with exponential backoff 2s, 4s, 8s.
If Grok call fails repeatedly, log error and continue; do not fail whole job.
Malformed classifier output (no SAME_KEY/DIFFERENT_KEY token): log parse error, do not write cache entry, treat as DIFFERENT_KEY.
Conflict case insert races are handled via ON CONFLICT/duplicate guard; duplicate pairs are skipped silently.

types_and_interfaces.name: JwtClaims
types_and_interfaces.definition: export type JwtClaims = { user_id: string; company_id: string; role: 'admin' | 'editor' | 'viewer' };

types_and_interfaces.name: ResolveConflictRequest
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface ResolveConflictRequest { chosenObservationId: string; reason?: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ResolveConflictResponse
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface ResolveConflictResponse { conflictId: string; resolutionStatus: 'user_overridden'; winningObservationId: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ManualObservationRequest
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface ManualObservationRequest { label: string; normalizedKey: string; value: string; numericValue?: number; unit?: string; dataType: 'numeric' | 'percentage' | 'text' | 'boolean'; timeBehavior: 'periodic' | 'point_in_time' | 'none'; periodStart?: string; periodEnd?: string; categoryId?: string | null; status: 'candidate' | 'approved'; note?: string; sourceReference?: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ManualObservationResponse
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface ManualObservationResponse { id: string; status: 'candidate' | 'approved'; attestationRecordId: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ConflictDetectedEvent
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface ConflictDetectedEvent { type: 'conflict_detected'; conflictId: string; normalizedKey: string; matchMethod: 'exact' | 'semantic'; timestamp: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: NotificationEvent
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface NotificationEvent { type: 'notification'; notificationId: string; notificationType: 'conflict_detected' | 'conflict_resolved' | 'pipeline_done' | 'report_ready'; payload: Record<string, unknown>; unreadCount: number; timestamp: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: SemanticConflictJobPayload
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface SemanticConflictJobPayload { observationId: string; companyId: string; reason?: string; }

types_and_interfaces.name: LatestWinsResult
types_and_interfaces.definition: export interface LatestWinsResult { winner: { id: string }; loser: { id: string }; }

constants.name: LOW_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD
constants.purpose: Global extraction low-confidence threshold retained from prior slices; included as cross-slice runtime context.

constants.name: QUEUE_TIMEOUTS_MS
constants.value: { ocr-job: 180000, embedding-job: 120000, extraction-job: 300000, semantic-conflict-job: 60000, render-pdf-job: 90000, pending-obs-timeout: 30000 }
constants.purpose: Unified BullMQ timeout catalog used by queue registration and job processors.

constants.name: SEMANTIC_CONFLICT_RETRY_POLICY
constants.purpose: Reliability policy for semantic conflict classifier job.

constants.name: PIPELINE_EVENTS_CHANNEL_PREFIX
constants.purpose: Redis pub/sub prefix used by publishPipelineEvent and publishNotification for SSE fan-out.

constants.name: EQUAL_VALUE_TOLERANCE_RATIO
constants.purpose: Conflict suppression threshold (0.1% tolerance) when numeric values are effectively equal.

sse_events.consumed_by: src/app/api/pipeline/events/route.ts then UI consumers src/components/conflicts/ConflictInboxPage.tsx and src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx

acceptance_criteria: Approving two observations with same normalized_key and overlapping period creates ConflictCase with auto_resolved=true and later timestamp winner.
POST /api/conflicts/{id}/resolve with valid chosenObservationId returns 200, creates ConflictResolution, supersedes loser, and marks affected DerivationResult rows stale.
POST /api/conflicts/{id}/resolve with chosenObservationId not in conflict observation_ids returns 422.
POST /api/observations/manual valid candidate payload returns 201 and persists Observation + AttestationRecord.
notification SSE event is delivered within 2 seconds of Notification insert.
Notification bell badge increments on notification SSE without page reload.
PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read returns 200 { read: true } and later unread query excludes it.
KeyEquivalenceCache prevents second Grok call for same key pair (verified by mock call counter).
TypeScript and test gates pass: tsc --noEmit and vitest run (plus relevant Playwright conflict/notification/manual flows).

known_spec_deviations.reason: Spec §16 lists POST /api/observations; Slice 4 standardizes POST /api/observations/manual to avoid collision with future GET /api/observations listing and to clearly distinguish manual creation from pipeline-created observations.

implementation_order: Add conflict utilities: cache key generation, latest-wins, classifier integration, candidate query module.
Implement semantic-conflict-job processor in pipeline worker with idempotency, cache writes, conflict insert, stale derivation marking, and event publication.
Implement notification publisher utility that persists row and publishes notification SSE event with unread count.
Implement conflicts APIs: GET /api/conflicts and POST /api/conflicts/{id}/resolve with role/tenant enforcement and transactional writes.
Implement manual observation API POST /api/observations/manual with Zod validation, attestation insert, audit log, and conditional semantic job enqueue.
Implement notifications APIs: GET /api/notifications and PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read with ownership rules.
Extend existing pipeline SSE route to pass through conflict_detected and notification event payloads.
Create conflicts UI route/components including override dialog and optimistic updates.
Add manual observation form dialog and integrate trigger into observations page.
Add notification bell + items into topbar and sidebar unresolved conflict badge behavior.
Run unit/integration/E2E tests focused on conflict detection, override, manual observation, and live notification updates.
